We therefore need to put in a resistor that will reduce the 5v to 2v
and the current from 40mA to 20mA if we want to display the LED at itʼs 
maximum brightness. If we want the LED to be dimmer we could use a 
higher value of resistance.
So VR= 52= 3V Then is R = 3/0.02= 150 Ω
